title: Home
text:
Beihang University (BUAA)
I am a researcher at Beihang University (BUAA), working on virtual reality (VR), mixed reality (MR), and human-computer interaction (HCI). My recent work focuses on efficient interaction, foveated rendering, scene-aware methods, and AI for immersive environments.



VR/AR interaction techniques and user perception
Foveated rendering and neural scene representation
Scene-aware layout, navigation, and object arrangement in immersive environments
Haptic retargeting and multimodal interaction in VR





International Journal of Human-Computer Studies, 2026
IEEE TVCG / IEEE VR / IEEE ISMAR publications
VR 2025 Best Paper Honorable Mention (Fov-GS)
ISMAR 2024 Best Student Journal Paper (VPRF)





Email: your_email@buaa.edu.cn
GitHub: https://github.com/JianWu2025
Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/
